---
title: "Folded Histograms of Irrational Rotations: Sampling Certificates and Structural Mismatch to the Parry Measure"
subtitle: "Applied dynamical systems"
date: 2026-04-07
categories: [gen2, applied, submitted]
target-journal: "SIAM Journal on Applied Dynamical Systems"
status: "Submitted"
repo: "the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates"
theorems: 46
featured: false
video: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_certificates_video.mp4"
slides: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_certificates_slides.pdf"
podcast: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_certificates_podcast.wav"
description: "A two-stage audit framework for coarse-grained orbit data: certifying empirical folded histograms via star-discrepancy, TV, and relative-entropy bounds, then testing compatibility with the Parry equil..."
---

## Abstract

A two-stage audit framework for coarse-grained orbit data: certifying empirical folded histograms via star-discrepancy, TV, and relative-entropy bounds, then testing compatibility with the Parry equilibrium.

**Keywords:** irrational rotations, Sturmian sequences, Parry measure, Renyi divergence, statistical auditing

## Key Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Machine-verified theorems | 46 |
| Target journal | SIAM Journal on Applied Dynamical Systems |
| Status | Submitted |
| Scope | Applied dynamical systems |

## Infographic

![folded_rotation_histogram_certificates Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_certificates_infographic.png)

## Video Explainer

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_certificates_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_certificates_slides.pdf)
- [Podcast (WAV)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_certificates_podcast.wav)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_certificates_video.mp4)

## Links

- [Full Paper (GitHub)](../../papers/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates/)
- [Lean 4 Proofs](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath/tree/dev-automation-integration/lean4)
- [Automath Engine](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath)
